snippet.title: American Airlines CEO Robert Isom on Innovation and the Future
American Airline CEO Robert Isom on FAA outage: Investment is required, no doubt
snippet.description:
American Airlines hiked its revenue and profit estimates for the fourth quarter on Thursday. The Airlines' CEO Robert Isom joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss more. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi

snippet.title: American Airlines CEO Robert Isom at Skift Aviation Forum 2023
snippet.description:
Robert Isom, CEO of American Airlines ,spoke with Edward Russell, Editor, Skift Airline Weekly Editor Edward Russell at the Skift Aviation Forum in Ft Worth Texas in November 2023.

snippet.title: American Airlines CEO Robert Isom: I see robust demand going into 2024
snippet.description:
CNBC’s Phil LeBeau and American Airlines CEO Robert Isom joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the airline's quarterly earnings results, travel demand, Q4 outlook, capacity challenges, and more. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi
